ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Good attempt at context relevance and persona consistency, but the response could be more natural in tone to match Systems Engineer's methodical nature.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: While consistent with character traits and persona consistency, lacks context relevance as it doesn’t acknowledge the immediate situation or recent event affecting station security.
